title: Rename Tier1 tests to avoid grammar collision on false

source.subject: fix(corelib): rename Tier1 tests to avoid grammar collision on `false`

body:
## What shipped

Renames Tier1 tests that used identifiers colliding with the `false` keyword after grammar tightening.

## Source commit

Repository **`corelib`** · commit `5bc4e9a`

> fix(corelib): rename Tier1 tests to avoid grammar collision on `false`

## Completed

2026-05-23 (catalog cutoff window).
